NL Query: Show me the title and score for all XAFS proposals from the last 2 semesters. I need to see the ones that are no longer in evaluation but exclude any that were already scheduled. For each, determine if the final score reached the required threshold and provide the status and the proposer's name.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
(case when ev.final_score <= pth.threshold then 'Over / Equal'
when ev.final_score > pth.threshold then 'Under' end) as "Placement",
ps.name as "Status", p.semester as "Semester"
from  (select max(p1.semester) as max_sem from proposals p1)m , proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
left join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where (lower(ps.name) not like '%evaluation%' and p.status <> 'S' )
and p.semester between m.max_sem - 3 and m.max_sem - 1
and 'XAFS/XRF' in (p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name);

Schema.evaluations:
CREATE TABLE EVALUATIONS -- Description: Proposals evaluation
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SCORE NUMBER(38,0), 
	COMMENTS CLOB, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EVLT_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RELEVANCE NUMBER, 
	ORIGINALITY NUMBER, 
	LOWRISK NUMBER, 
	NEEDELETTRA NUMBER, 
	PREVRECORD NUMBER, 
	TECHNICAL_EVLT VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_OR_CMT VARCHAR2(25), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FINAL_SCORE NUMBER(4,2), 
	WEIGHTEDAVERAGE NUMBER(4,2), 
	COMPETENCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	QUARTER VARCHAR2(10), 
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INTERNAL_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	REEDITING VARCHAR2(1), 
	REEDIT_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_UNIQUE UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, EVLT_ID, BML_OR_CMT)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_EVLT_FK FOREIGN KEY (EVLT_ID)
	  REFERENCES EVALUATION_TYPES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: اعرض العنوان والدرجة لجميع مقترحات XAFS من الفصل قبل الماضي للتي انتهى تقييمها ولم تجدول، وحدد ما اذا وصلت الدرجة للحد المطلوب مع ذكر الحالة واسم مقدم المقترح.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
(case when ev.final_score <= pth.threshold then 'Over / Equal'
when ev.final_score > pth.threshold then 'Under' end) as "Placement",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
left join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where (lower(ps.name) not like '%schedule%' and lower(ps.name) not like '%evaluation%')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1) -1
and 'XAFS/XRF' in (p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name);

	FINAL_SCORE NUMBER(4,2), 
	WEIGHTEDAVERAGE NUMBER(4,2), 
	COMPETENCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	QUARTER VARCHAR2(10), 
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INTERNAL_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	REEDITING VARCHAR2(1), 
	REEDIT_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_UNIQUE UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, EVLT_ID, BML_OR_CMT)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_EVLT_FK FOREIGN KEY (EVLT_ID)
	  REFERENCES EVALUATION_TYPES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE,

);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: ما هي أكثر دولة يشارك مواطنوها الإناث كمستخدمين في سيسامي
SQL Query:
select *
from ( select
c.name as "Nationality",
count(case when u.gender = 'F' then 1 end) as "Number of Female Users"
from users u
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
group by c.name
order by "Number of Female Users" desc
)
where rownum = 1;

NL Query: Which institute has the most female users and in which country is it based?
SQL Query:
select *
from (
select i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Country",
count(case when u.gender = 'F' then 1 end) as "Number of Female Users"
from users u, institutes i
where u.ins_id = i.id
group by i.name, i.cnt_name
order by "Number of Female Users" desc
)
where rownum = 1;

NL Query: من بين جميع المعاهد المسجلة في النظام، أظهر لي اسم المعهد  الذي يضم أكبر عدد من المستخدمات -في كل دولة.
SQL Query:
select "Country", "Institute", "Number of Users"
from (
select i.cnt_name as "Country",
i.name as "Institute",
count(*) as "Number of Users",
row_number() over(
partition by i.cnt_name
order by count(*) desc) as rn
from users u
join institutes i on u.ins_id = i.id
group by i.name, i.cnt_name
)
where rn = 1;

NL Query: Who are the facility's staff who work/are skilled within IT field? If they have more than one field then show that as well.
SQL Query:
select u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type",
comp1.description as "Competence 1",
comp2.description as "Competence 2"
from users u
join competence comp1 on comp1.code = u.comp_1 
join competence comp2 on comp2.code = u.comp_2
where u.researcher_type = 'SES'
and 'IT' in (u.comp_1,u.comp_2)
order by u.id

NL Query: Get the titles of experiments carried out in any of the beamlines during the past semesters but didn't send in a safety form.
SQL Query:
SELECT p.ID AS "Proposal", u.name||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer" , 
p.TITLE AS "Title", 
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) AS "Beamline",
p.semester as "Semester"
FROM (select max(p1.semester)as max_sem from proposals p1) m, PROPOSALS p, users u
WHERE p.usr_id=u.id
and p.status='S'
and ((select count(*) from safety_infos si where si.prop_id=p.id and si.safety_received='Y')<(select count(*) from safety_infos si where si.prop_id=p.id))
and p.semester <> m.max_sem;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS

	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB,

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE,

	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
Schema.safety_infos:
CREATE TABLE SAFETY_INFOS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SUBSTANCE VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FORMULA VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- category: G = Gas, L = Liquid, M = Multilayer, S = Single Crystal, O = Other, B = Biocrystallography, P = Powder, s = Solid
	OTHER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(30), 
	SAFI_SIZE NUMBER, 
	MASS NUMBER, 
	SURFACE_AREA NUMBER, 
	SPACE_GROUP VARCHAR2(30), 
	CELL_DIMENSIONS VARCHAR2(80), 
	CONTAINER VARCHAR2(60), 
	RISK VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- risk: Y = Yes, N = No, U = Unknown
	RADIOACTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- radioactive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CORROSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- corrosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CONTAMINANT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- contaminant: Y = Yes, N = No
	BIO_HAZARD VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- bio_hazard: Y = Yes, N = No
	TOXIC VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- toxic: Y = Yes, N = No
	OXIDISING VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- oxidising: Y = Yes, N = No
	COMBUSTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- combustive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CARCINOGENE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- carcinogene: Y = Yes, N = No
	INFLAMMABLE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- inflammable: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXPLOSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- explosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXHAUST_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- sample_disposal: R = Removed by user
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- status: A = Certified , N = Not certified
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SAFETY_STATUS VARCHAR2(1), -- safety_status: N = Not checked, Y = Passed without prescription, W = Warning, P = Passed with prescription
	SAFETY_COMMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	VOLUME NUMBER, 
	PRESSURE NUMBER, 
	UNATENDED VARCHAR2(10), 
	SUPPLIER VARCHAR2(40), 
	CAS VARCHAR2(15), 
	SAFETY_RECEIVED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N', 
	USAGE_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_TOXIC_000 CHECK (TOXIC IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','N')) ENABLE,
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_SAMPL_000 CHECK (SAMPLE_DISPOSAL IN ('R','S','D')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RISK_000 CHECK (RISK IN ('Y','N','U')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RADIO_000 CHECK (RADIOACTIVE IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_OXIDI_000 CHECK (OXIDISING IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_INFLA_000 CHECK (INFLAMMABLE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_EXPLO_000 CHECK (EXPLOSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CORRO_000 CHECK (CORROSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CONTA_000 CHECK (CONTAMINANT='Y' OR CONTAMINANT='N') ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_COMBU_000 CHECK (COMBUSTIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CATEG_000 CHECK (CATEGORY IN ('G','L','M','S','O','B','P','s')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CARCI_000 CHECK (CARCINOGENE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_BIO_H_000 CHECK (BIO_HAZARD IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.CATEGORY IS 'Label=Physical state ,DefList= Other,Powder,Liquid,Single Crystal,Multilayer,Biocrystallography,Gas,Solid ,ValList= O,P,L,S,M,B,G,s'
COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.RISK IS 'Label=Risk in sample, preparation or equipment , DefList=Yes,No,Unknown, ValList=Y,N,U'

NL Query: استخرج عناوين التجارب التي اجريت في اي من خطوط الاشعاع خلال الفصول الماضية ولكنها لم ترسل نموذج سلامة.
SQL Query:
SELECT p.ID AS "Proposal", u.name||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer" , 
p.TITLE AS "Title", 
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) AS "Beamline",
p.semester as "Semester"
FROM (select max(p1.semester)as max_sem from proposals p1) m, PROPOSALS p, users u
WHERE p.usr_id=u.id
and p.status='S'
and ((select count(*) from safety_infos si where si.prop_id=p.id and si.safety_received='Y')<(select count(*) from safety_infos si where si.prop_id=p.id))
and p.semester <> m.max_sem;

CREATE TABLE SAFETY_INFOS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SUBSTANCE VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FORMULA VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- category: G = Gas, L = Liquid, M = Multilayer, S = Single Crystal, O = Other, B = Biocrystallography, P = Powder, s = Solid
	OTHER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(30), 
	SAFI_SIZE NUMBER, 
	MASS NUMBER, 
	SURFACE_AREA NUMBER, 
	SPACE_GROUP VARCHAR2(30), 
	CELL_DIMENSIONS VARCHAR2(80), 
	CONTAINER VARCHAR2(60), 
	RISK VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- risk: Y = Yes, N = No, U = Unknown
	RADIOACTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- radioactive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CORROSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- corrosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CONTAMINANT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- contaminant: Y = Yes, N = No
	BIO_HAZARD VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- bio_hazard: Y = Yes, N = No
	TOXIC VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- toxic: Y = Yes, N = No
	OXIDISING VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- oxidising: Y = Yes, N = No
	COMBUSTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- combustive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CARCINOGENE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- carcinogene: Y = Yes, N = No
	INFLAMMABLE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- inflammable: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXPLOSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- explosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXHAUST_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- sample_disposal: R = Removed by user
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- status: A = Certified , N = Not certified
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SAFETY_STATUS VARCHAR2(1), -- safety_status: N = Not checked, Y = Passed without prescription, W = Warning, P = Passed with prescription
	SAFETY_COMMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	VOLUME NUMBER, 
	PRESSURE NUMBER, 
	UNATENDED VARCHAR2(10), 
	SUPPLIER VARCHAR2(40), 
	CAS VARCHAR2(15), 
	SAFETY_RECEIVED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N', 
	USAGE_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_TOXIC_000 CHECK (TOXIC IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','N')) ENABLE,
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_SAMPL_000 CHECK (SAMPLE_DISPOSAL IN ('R','S','D')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RISK_000 CHECK (RISK IN ('Y','N','U')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RADIO_000 CHECK (RADIOACTIVE IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_OXIDI_000 CHECK (OXIDISING IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_INFLA_000 CHECK (INFLAMMABLE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_EXPLO_000 CHECK (EXPLOSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CORRO_000 CHECK (CORROSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CONTA_000 CHECK (CONTAMINANT='Y' OR CONTAMINANT='N') ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_COMBU_000 CHECK (COMBUSTIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CATEG_000 CHECK (CATEGORY IN ('G','L','M','S','O','B','P','s')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CARCI_000 CHECK (CARCINOGENE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_BIO_H_000 CHECK (BIO_HAZARD IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.CATEGORY IS 'Label=Physical state ,DefList= Other,Powder,Liquid,Single Crystal,Multilayer,Biocrystallography,Gas,Solid ,ValList= O,P,L,S,M,B,G,s'
COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.RISK IS 'Label=Risk in sample, preparation or equipment , DefList=Yes,No,Unknown, ValList=Y,N,U'

NL Query: Generate a report for the HESEB beamline regarding proposals from the semester immediately preceding the most recent one. Include only those that finished the evaluation process but were not scheduled for beamtime. List the proposal ID, full name of the proposer, and the title. Additionally, compare the final score against the threshold and label it as 'Over / Equal' or 'Under' accordingly.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
(case when ev.final_score <= pth.threshold then 'Over / Equal'
when ev.final_score > pth.threshold then 'Under' end) as "Placement",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
left join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where (lower(ps.name) not like '%schedule%' and lower(ps.name) not like '%evaluation%')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1) -1
and 'HESEB' in (p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name);

CREATE TABLE EVALUATIONS -- Description: Proposals evaluation
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SCORE NUMBER(38,0), 
	COMMENTS CLOB, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE,

	ORIGINALITY NUMBER,

NL Query: Which of the last semester's proposals meant for beats have passed the final evaluation but weren't scheduled a beamtime slot? Get the title and score and specify whether it score higher or lower than the threshold.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
(case when ev.final_score <= pth.threshold then 'Over / Equal'
when ev.final_score > pth.threshold then 'Under' end) as "Placement",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
left join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where (lower(ps.name) not like '%schedule%' and lower(ps.name) not like '%evaluation%')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1) -1
and 'BEATS' in (p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name);

NL Query: قم باعداد تقرير عن  مقترحات HESEB التي لم تحصل على وقت لتنفيذ التجربة رغم اكتمال تقييمها، مع تحديد ما اذا كانت درجة التقييم النهائية قد تجاوزت الحد المطلوب ام لا.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
(case when ev.final_score <= pth.threshold then 'Over / Equal'
when ev.final_score > pth.threshold then 'Under' end) as "Placement",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
left join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where (lower(ps.name) not like '%schedule%' and lower(ps.name) not like '%evaluation%')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1) -1
and 'HESEB' in (p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name);

NL Query: اصدر تقريرا لخط اشعاع HESEB بخصوص مقترحات الفصل قبل الماضي، يشمل فقط المقترحات التي انهت التقييم ولم تجدول، مع مقارنة الدرجة النهائية بعتبة القبول وتصنيفها (اعلى/يساوي او اقل).
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
(case when ev.final_score <= pth.threshold then 'Over / Equal'
when ev.final_score > pth.threshold then 'Under' end) as "Placement",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
left join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where (lower(ps.name) not like '%schedule%' and lower(ps.name) not like '%evaluation%')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1) -1
and 'HESEB' in (p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name);

Schema.evaluations:
CREATE TABLE EVALUATIONS -- Description: Proposals evaluation
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SCORE NUMBER(38,0), 
	COMMENTS CLOB, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EVLT_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RELEVANCE NUMBER, 
	ORIGINALITY NUMBER, 
	LOWRISK NUMBER, 
	NEEDELETTRA NUMBER, 
	PREVRECORD NUMBER, 
	TECHNICAL_EVLT VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_OR_CMT VARCHAR2(25), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FINAL_SCORE NUMBER(4,2), 
	WEIGHTEDAVERAGE NUMBER(4,2), 
	COMPETENCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	QUARTER VARCHAR2(10), 
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INTERNAL_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	REEDITING VARCHAR2(1), 
	REEDIT_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_UNIQUE UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, EVLT_ID, BML_OR_CMT)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_EVLT_FK FOREIGN KEY (EVLT_ID)
	  REFERENCES EVALUATION_TYPES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'

NL Query: هل هناك مستخدمون قاموا بتقديم اكثر من 10 مقترحات و كم واحدا تم تقديمه و من يمتلك أكثر عدد من المقترحات؟
SQL Query:
select u.id,
 u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
p.num_p as "Number of Proposals"
from users u,
(select usr_id,
count(*) as num_p
from proposals
group by usr_id
having count(*) > 10) p
where u.id = p.usr_id
order by "Number of Proposals" desc;

NL Query: استخرج بيانات طلبات تصريح المختبر المقدمة في شهر حزيران. المطلوب: رقم الطلب، والاسم الكامل للمستخدم، وتواريخ الوصول والمغادرة، ونوع التصريح، ورقم المقترح، وحالة الطلب.
SQL Query:
SELECT a.access_id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname AS "User", 
a.arrival AS "Arrival", 
a.departure AS "Departure", 
(select description from list_of_values where list='UserTypes' and code=a.user_type) as "Access type",
a.prop_id AS "Proposal", (select description from list_of_values where list='AccessStatus' and code=a.status) as "Status" 
FROM USERS u 
join ACCESSES a on a.usr_id=u.id 
left outer join PROPOSALS p on p.id=a.prop_id 
WHERE extract(month from a.arrival) = 6 ;

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE,

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE,

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE,

	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE,

	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

Schema.accesses:
CREATE TABLE ACCESSES --Description: Lab Access Requests
   (	ACCESS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID VARCHAR2(15), 
	ARRIVAL DATE, 
	DEPARTURE DATE, 
	USER_TYPE VARCHAR2(5) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(30), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(400), 
	LAB_NAME VARCHAR2(100), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), 
	GUEST_NET VARCHAR2(1), 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	VIDEO_ELETTRA VARCHAR2(1), 
	VIDEO_FERMI VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT PK_ACCESSES PRIMARY KEY (ACCESS_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_ACCESSES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_INS_ID FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.STATUS IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''AccessStatus'''
	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.USER_TYPE IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''UserTypes'''

NL Query: Who requested lab access during June (of all years)? List the access request number, full name of the user, arrival and departure date, type of access requested, the proposal's id number, and the request's status.
SQL Query:
SELECT a.access_id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname AS "User", 
a.arrival AS "Arrival", 
a.departure AS "Departure", 
(select description from list_of_values where list='UserTypes' and code=a.user_type) as "Access type",
a.prop_id AS "Proposal", (select description from list_of_values where list='AccessStatus' and code=a.status) as "Status" 
FROM USERS u 
join ACCESSES a on a.usr_id=u.id 
left outer join PROPOSALS p on p.id=a.prop_id 
WHERE extract(month from a.arrival) = 6 ;

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'
Schema.accesses:
CREATE TABLE ACCESSES --Description: Lab Access Requests
   (	ACCESS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID VARCHAR2(15), 
	ARRIVAL DATE, 
	DEPARTURE DATE, 
	USER_TYPE VARCHAR2(5) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(30), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(400), 
	LAB_NAME VARCHAR2(100),

	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1),

	 CONSTRAINT PK_ACCESSES PRIMARY KEY (ACCESS_ID)

	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_INS_ID FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.STATUS IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''AccessStatus'''
	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.USER_TYPE IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''UserTypes'''

NL Query: Are there any publications related to a beamline which are validated, find out how many are there per beamline?
SQL Query:
select beam.name as "Beamline",
count(pub.pbl_id) as "No. of Publications"
from beamlines beam, publi pub
left join publi_items i on pub.pbl_id = i.pbl_id
where code like '%' || beam.name 
and pub.status = 'Y'
group by beam.name;

Schema.beamlines:
CREATE TABLE BEAMLINES 
   (	NAME VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	HOMEPAGE VARCHAR2(1024), 
	OPERATIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- Operative: Y = Yes, N = No
	REF_NATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	SHORT_NAME VARCHAR2(10), 
	IH_RESEARCH_PERC NUMBER, 
	FRONTEND VARCHAR2(6), 
	VIDEO_ID NUMBER, 
	FRACTION VARCHAR2(10), 
	DEFAULT_CMT_ID VARCHAR2(16), 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT BML_PK PRIMARY KEY (NAME)
    
	 CONSTRAINT BEAMLINES_UK1 UNIQUE (SHORT_NAME)
   
   ); 
   COMMENT ON COLUMN BEAMLINES.NAME IS 'Label=Beamline Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN BEAMLINES.DESCRIPTION IS 'Label=Description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN BEAMLINES.OPERATIVE IS 'Label=Operative'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN BEAMLINES.REF_NATION IS 'Label=Beamline owner country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY NAME'
Schema.publi:
CREATE TABLE PUBLI --Description = Publication details 
   (	PBL_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(1024), 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(64) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	WORK_DONE_ELE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- work_done_ele: Y= Yes, P = 'Yes, only in part', N = No
	ELE_AUTHOR CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- ele_author: Y = Yes, N = No
	JOURNAL_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	VOLUME VARCHAR2(128), 
	ISSUE VARCHAR2(32), 
	QTR VARCHAR2(20), 
	YEAR NUMBER, 
	BEAM_1 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_2 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_3 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_4 VARCHAR2(30), 
	PROP_1 NUMBER, 
	PROP_2 NUMBER, 
	PROP_3 NUMBER, 
	PROP_4 NUMBER, 
	COMMENTS VARCHAR2(1024), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	PHONE VARCHAR2(50), 
	ELE_NUM VARCHAR2(20), 
	THES_TYPE VARCHAR2(30), 
	INSTITUTION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CITY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	COUNTRY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	PATENT_NUMB VARCHAR2(30), 
	REVIEW VARCHAR2(50), 
	PUB_TYPE VARCHAR2(50), 
	REVISION VARCHAR2(30), 
	BOOK_TITLE VARCHAR2(255), 
	PUBLISHER VARCHAR2(100), 
	EDITION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONFERENCE VARCHAR2(128), 
	PBL_TYPE CHAR(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- pbl_type: B=Book or Book Chapter, C=Conference Presentations, G=SESAME Highlights, I=Internal SESAME Staff Reports, J=Journal Article, P=Patent, R=Contributed News Articles, Book Reviews, T=Thesis
	STATUS CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- status: Y =  Validated, N = Submitted 
	EDITOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	ADVISOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	DAY NUMBER, 
	PRES_TYPE VARCHAR2(10), 
	FPAGE VARCHAR2(10), 
	UE_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	OTHER VARCHAR2(256), 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	OTHER_BEAM VARCHAR2(30), 
	OTHER_LAB VARCHAR2(50), 
	OTHER_PUBLI_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	CONF_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONF_COUNTRY VARCHAR2(40), 
	CONF_DATE DATE, 
	URL VARCHAR2(2000), 
	DOI VARCHAR2(4000), 
	REVIEW_PANEL VARCHAR2(20), 
	IN_HOUSE VARCHAR2(20), 
	COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(20), 
	ILO VARCHAR2(20), 
	REVIEW_WORK VARCHAR2(20), 
	LABORATORY VARCHAR2(40), 
	SERIAL_NUMBER VARCHAR2(200), 
	FROM_PAGE VARCHAR2(20), 
	TO_PAGE VARCHAR2(20), 
	LABORATORY_2 VARCHAR2(40), 
	LABORATORY_3 VARCHAR2(40), 
	WORK_DONE_CERIC CHAR(1), 
	CERIC_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT PUBLI_PK PRIMARY KEY (PBL_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_PUBLI_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN PUBLI IS 'List = select code, description from list_of_values where list=''PubliWorkDoneEle'''
Schema.publi_items:

NL Query: For every semester (excluding 9 - 15) show how many shifts were available for general users.
SQL Query:
SELECT bt.bml_short_name AS "Beamline", 
bt.avail_gu as "Shifts available for GU", 
bt.semester as "Semester"
FROM bt_distribution bt, beamlines beam 
WHERE 
bt.semester BETWEEN 0 and 8
and bt.bml_short_name=beam.short_name  
and beam.operative='Y'
Order by "Semester", "Beamline";

NL Query: استخرج توزيع وقت الحزمة (beam time distribution) لخط الإشعاع المسمى 'XAFS/XRF' (بشرط أن يكون قيد التشغيل حاليا). أظهر الاسم المختصر للخط، والفصل، وإجمالي الوقت المتاح، ومناوبات الصيانة الداخلية، والمناوبات المتاحة للمستخدمين (GU)، وعدد المقترحات والتحولات المطلوبة للـ GU، مع عرض الاسم الرسمي للخط وترتيب النتائج حسب الفصل .
SQL Query:
SELECT bt.bml_short_name AS "Beamline", 
bt.semester as "Semester",
bt.total_avail as "Total Available Beam Time", 
bt.in_house as "Shifts maint / in-house", 
bt.avail_gu as "Shifts available for GU", 
bt.proposals_gu as "Proposals GU", 
bt.requested_gu as "Shift req. GU", 
beam.name as "Beamline official name" 
FROM bt_distribution bt, beamlines beam 
WHERE bt.bml_short_name=beam.short_name 
and beam.name='XAFS/XRF'  
and beam.operative='Y'
Order by "Semester";

NL Query: Create a full report (excluding all details on NU) regarding the IR beamtime distribution from the beginning till the 5th semester.
SQL Query:
SELECT bt.bml_short_name AS "Beamline", 
bt.semester as "Semester",
bt.total_avail as "Total Available Beam Time", 
bt.in_house as "Shifts maint / in-house", 
bt.major_maint as "Major maint./commiss.", 
bt.ilo as "ILO Shifts", 
bt.gu_already_allocated as "GU already allocated Shifts", 
bt.gu_lt as "GU allocated Long Term", 
bt.avail_lt as "Available for Long Term", 
bt.requested_lt as "Requested for Long Term", 
bt.avail_gu as "Shifts available for GU", 
bt.proposals_gu as "Proposals GU", 
bt.requested_gu as "Shift req. GU", 
bt.gu_ratio as "Subscription ratio GU", 
beam.name as "Beamline official name" 
FROM bt_distribution bt, beamlines beam 
WHERE bt.semester between 0 and 5 
and bt.bml_short_name=beam.short_name 
and beam.name='IR' 
and beam.operative='Y'
Order by Semester;

NL Query: كم عدد المستخدمين في مرحلة البكالوريوس (undergrads)، وكم منهم شارك في تجارب او beamtime؟
SQL Query:
select decode(u.researcher_type,'UND', 'Undergraduate Student') as "Researcher Type",
count(distinct u.id) as "Ungraduate Students",
count(distinct case when (p.usr_id is not null or pr.usr_id is not null) then u.id end) as "Participating Ungrads"
from users u
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants pr on pr.usr_id = u.id
where u.researcher_type = 'UND'
group by u.researcher_type;

NL Query: اي من ال proposals التي تم تسليمها خلال اي من الفصول لل Material science beamline ممول؟ قم باظهار الرقم المرجعي لل proposals, الاسم الكامل ,و الفصل.
SQL Query:
SELECT distinct  p.ID AS "Proposal", 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname AS "Proposer", 
p.TITLE AS "Title", 
p.semester AS "Semester", 
ps.name AS "Status" 
FROM PROPOSALS p, USERS u, proposals_status ps
WHERE p.usr_id=u.id 
and p.fund_source is not null 
and p.status=ps.code 
and p.required_bml_name = 'MS/XPD';

NL Query: View the details of the proposal, include: proposer's full name and the proposal's id,  proposal title, beamline, semester, status and feasibility.
SQL Query:
SELECT distinct  p.ID AS "Proposal",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname AS "Proposer",
p.TITLE AS "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name,p.required_bml_name) AS "Beamline",
p.semester as "Semester",
ps.name AS "Status",
DECODE(p.FEASIBILITY,NULL,'---','Y','Viable','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting',
'R','Feasible on required beamline','A','Feasible on alternative beamline') AS "Feasibility"
FROM PROPOSALS p, USERS u, proposals_status ps
WHERE p.usr_id=u.id
and p.status=ps.code;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

NL Query: ما هي عناوين المقترحات المقدمة من فريق مكون من مستخدمين اثنين أو أكثر؟ اشمل فقط المقترحات في الفصل الحالي
SQL Query:
select distinct p.id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer", 
p.title as "Title"
from proposals p
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
left join participants par on par.prop_id = p.id
where par.prop_id is not null
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
order by p.id desc;

Schema.participants:
CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANTS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	INSTITUTE_NAME VARCHAR2(255), 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(255), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_UK1 UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, NAME)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) DISABLE
);

NL Query: من هم الاشخاص الذين قدموا إلى SESAME  بين شهر 3 و 6 العام الماضي؟
SQL Query:
SELECT v.ID,
v.FAMILY_NAME AS "Last name",
v.FIRST_NAME AS "First Name",
v.DATE_OF_ARRIVAL AS "Arrival Date",
v.DATE_OF_DEPARTURE AS "Departure Date"
FROM VISITORS v
WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM v.DATE_OF_ARRIVAL) BETWEEN 3 AND 6
and extract(year from v.date_of_arrival) = extract(year from sysdate) - 1;

Schema.visitors:
CREATE TABLE VISITORS -- Description: Deatails of visitors and their visit 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	REQ_DATE DATE DEFAULT sysdate NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FAMILY_NAME VARCHAR2(60), 
	FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2(200) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	AFFILIATION VARCHAR2(2000) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	COUNTRY VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DATE_OF_ARRIVAL DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TIME_OF_ARRIVAL VARCHAR2(100), 
	DATE_OF_DEPARTURE DATE, 
	NOTES_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(2000), 
	TIME_OF_DEPARTURE VARCHAR2(100), 
	USER_ID NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 1001 NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CHECKEDIN VARCHAR2(100), 
	BARCODE NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT NULL NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT VISITORS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

NL Query: Extract the first and last name of people who have visited the facility.
SQL Query:
SELECT v.ID,
v.FIRST_NAME ||' '|| v.FAMILY_NAME AS "Visitor" FROM VISITORS v;

NL Query: ما اسماء الاشخاص الذين قاموا بزيارة سيسامي خلال الفترة ما بين شهر اذار وحزيران خلال جميع السنوات السابقة و في اي تاريخ جاؤو؟
SQL Query:
SELECT v.ID,
v.FIRST_NAME ||' '|| v.FAMILY_NAME AS "Visitor", v.DATE_OF_ARRIVAL AS "Arrival Date",
v.DATE_OF_DEPARTURE AS "Departure Date"
FROM VISITORS v
WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM v.DATE_OF_ARRIVAL) BETWEEN 3 AND 6;

NL Query: How many publications are registered in the system per each type?
SQL Query:
select val.description as "Publication Type",
count(pub.pbl_id) as "No. of Publications"
from publi pub
join list_of_values val on val.code = pub.pbl_type and val.list = 'PubliTypes'
group by val.description;

Schema.publi:
CREATE TABLE PUBLI --Description = Publication details 
   (	PBL_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(1024), 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(64) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	WORK_DONE_ELE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- work_done_ele: Y= Yes, P = 'Yes, only in part', N = No
	ELE_AUTHOR CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- ele_author: Y = Yes, N = No
	JOURNAL_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	VOLUME VARCHAR2(128), 
	ISSUE VARCHAR2(32), 
	QTR VARCHAR2(20), 
	YEAR NUMBER, 
	BEAM_1 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_2 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_3 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_4 VARCHAR2(30), 
	PROP_1 NUMBER, 
	PROP_2 NUMBER, 
	PROP_3 NUMBER, 
	PROP_4 NUMBER, 
	COMMENTS VARCHAR2(1024), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	PHONE VARCHAR2(50), 
	ELE_NUM VARCHAR2(20), 
	THES_TYPE VARCHAR2(30), 
	INSTITUTION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CITY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	COUNTRY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	PATENT_NUMB VARCHAR2(30), 
	REVIEW VARCHAR2(50), 
	PUB_TYPE VARCHAR2(50), 
	REVISION VARCHAR2(30), 
	BOOK_TITLE VARCHAR2(255), 
	PUBLISHER VARCHAR2(100), 
	EDITION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONFERENCE VARCHAR2(128), 
	PBL_TYPE CHAR(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- pbl_type: B=Book or Book Chapter, C=Conference Presentations, G=SESAME Highlights, I=Internal SESAME Staff Reports, J=Journal Article, P=Patent, R=Contributed News Articles, Book Reviews, T=Thesis
	STATUS CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- status: Y =  Validated, N = Submitted 
	EDITOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	ADVISOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	DAY NUMBER, 
	PRES_TYPE VARCHAR2(10), 
	FPAGE VARCHAR2(10), 
	UE_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	OTHER VARCHAR2(256), 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	OTHER_BEAM VARCHAR2(30), 
	OTHER_LAB VARCHAR2(50), 
	OTHER_PUBLI_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	CONF_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONF_COUNTRY VARCHAR2(40), 
	CONF_DATE DATE, 
	URL VARCHAR2(2000), 
	DOI VARCHAR2(4000), 
	REVIEW_PANEL VARCHAR2(20), 
	IN_HOUSE VARCHAR2(20), 
	COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(20), 
	ILO VARCHAR2(20), 
	REVIEW_WORK VARCHAR2(20), 
	LABORATORY VARCHAR2(40), 
	SERIAL_NUMBER VARCHAR2(200), 
	FROM_PAGE VARCHAR2(20), 
	TO_PAGE VARCHAR2(20), 
	LABORATORY_2 VARCHAR2(40), 
	LABORATORY_3 VARCHAR2(40), 
	WORK_DONE_CERIC CHAR(1), 
	CERIC_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT PUBLI_PK PRIMARY KEY (PBL_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_PUBLI_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN PUBLI IS 'List = select code, description from list_of_values where list=''PubliWorkDoneEle'''

NL Query: Count how many proposals/beamtimes/experiments has each user taken part in. Starting from the ones with the most participations.
SQL Query:
With all_participants as (
Select usr_id from proposals
Union ALL
Select usr_id from participants
) select ap.usr_id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Participant Name",
count(*) as "Total Participation" 
from all_participants ap 
join users u on u.id = ap.usr_id
group by ap.usr_id, u.name, u.lastname
order by count(*) desc;

Schema.participants:
CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANTS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	INSTITUTE_NAME VARCHAR2(255), 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(255), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_UK1 UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, NAME)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) DISABLE
);
Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE,

NL Query: What are the names of the users who have at least one experiment or proposal record? Also counting how many each one of them have.
SQL Query:
With all_participants as (
Select usr_id from proposals
Union ALL
Select usr_id from participants
) select ap.usr_id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Participant Name",
count(*) as "Total Participation" 
from all_participants ap 
join users u on u.id = ap.usr_id
group by ap.usr_id, u.name, u.lastname;

	INS_ID NUMBER,

	 CONSTRAINT PART_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE,

);

NL Query: احسب عدد المقترحات او التجارب التي شارك فيها كل مستخدم سواء كان مقدم المقترح او مشاركا فيه فقط، بدءا من الاكثر مشاركة.
SQL Query:
With all_participants as (
Select usr_id from proposals
Union ALL
Select usr_id from participants
) select ap.usr_id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Participant Name",
count(*) as "Total Participation" 
from all_participants ap 
join users u on u.id = ap.usr_id
group by ap.usr_id, u.name, u.lastname
order by count(*) desc;

NL Query: ما هي اسماء المستخدمين الذين لديهم سجل يبيم مشاركتهم في تجربة او مقترح واحد على الاقل؟ مع عد السجلات لكل منهم.
SQL Query:
With all_participants as (
Select usr_id from proposals
Union ALL
Select usr_id from participants
) select ap.usr_id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Participant Name",
count(*) as "Total Participation" 
from all_participants ap 
join users u on u.id = ap.usr_id
group by ap.usr_id, u.name, u.lastname;

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE,

	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)

	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE,

);

NL Query: Out of all the users registered in the system how many could possibly be put forward as candidates for a specific event which requires the users to be at least 35 years old and have some kind of affiliation with the facility (so they've either sent in a proposal, took part in an experiment or attended a user's event). List the names of possible candidates along with details on their age, institute and nationality, whether they're still students or work in academics or industry ..etc, and their competence/field they're in. Also a way to contact them preferably by email.
SQL Query:
with user_age as (select id,
floor(extract(year from sysdate) - extract(year from birth)- 
case when to_char(sysdate,'MMDD') < to_char(birth,'MMDD') then 1 else 0 end) as age from users)
select distinct u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
a.age AS "Age",
u.email as "Email", 
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type",
comp.description as "Competence",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join user_age a on a.id = u.id
join competence comp on comp.code = u.comp_1
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants pr on pr.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_15th_um um15 on um15.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_16um um16 on um16.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_17th_um um17 on um17.usr_id = u.id
where a.age >= 35
and (p.usr_id is not null 
or pr.usr_id is not null
or um.usr_id is not null
or um15.usr_id is not null
or um16.usr_id is not null
or um17.usr_id is not null
)
order by a.age;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: Report back with the id, name, age, email, researcher type, main field of expertise, nationality and institute of all the registered users who have at least participated once in either a proposal, experiment/beamtime or a users' meeting and are 35 or older.
SQL Query:
with user_age as (select id,
floor(extract(year from sysdate) - extract(year from birth)- 
case when to_char(sysdate,'MMDD') < to_char(birth,'MMDD') then 1 else 0 end) as age from users)
select distinct u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
a.age AS "Age",
u.email as "Email", 
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type",
comp.description as "Competence",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join user_age a on a.id = u.id
join competence comp on comp.code = u.comp_1
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants pr on pr.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_15th_um um15 on um15.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_16um um16 on um16.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_17th_um um17 on um17.usr_id = u.id
where a.age >= 35
and (p.usr_id is not null 
or pr.usr_id is not null
or um.usr_id is not null
or um15.usr_id is not null
or um16.usr_id is not null
or um17.usr_id is not null
)
order by a.age;

Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'
