Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: قدم تقريرا بالمعرف والاسم والعمر والايميل ونوع الباحث ومجال الخبرة والجنسية والمعهد لكل المستخدمين المسجلين الذين شاركوا بمقترح او تجربة او اجتماع مستخدمين واعمارهم 35 عاما  او أكثر.
SQL Query:
with user_age as (select id,
floor(extract(year from sysdate) - extract(year from birth)- 
case when to_char(sysdate,'MMDD') < to_char(birth,'MMDD') then 1 else 0 end) as age from users)
select distinct u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
a.age AS "Age",
u.email as "Email", 
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type",
comp.description as "Competence",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join user_age a on a.id = u.id
join competence comp on comp.code = u.comp_1
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants pr on pr.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_15th_um um15 on um15.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_16um um16 on um16.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_17th_um um17 on um17.usr_id = u.id
where a.age >= 35
and (p.usr_id is not null 
or pr.usr_id is not null
or um.usr_id is not null
or um15.usr_id is not null
or um16.usr_id is not null
or um17.usr_id is not null
)
order by a.age;

	ITALIAN_PROV VARCHAR2(2), 
	ITALIAN_CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	END_DATE DATE, 
	PEC VARCHAR2(60), 
	NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(60), 
	 CONSTRAINT INS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.NAME IS 'Label=Institute name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ADDRESS IS 'Label=Address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ZIP IS 'Label=Zip code'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
Schema.participants:
CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANTS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	INSTITUTE_NAME VARCHAR2(255), 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(255), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_UK1 UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, NAME)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) DISABLE
);

NL Query: اعرض فقط الأسماء الكاملة للمستخدمين الذين طلبوا الدخول لمختبر XAFS
SQL Query:
SELECT a.access_id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname AS "User"
FROM USERS u 
join ACCESSES a on a.usr_id=u.id 
left outer join PROPOSALS p on p.id=a.prop_id 
WHERE a.bml_name='XAFS/XRF';

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

Schema.accesses:
CREATE TABLE ACCESSES --Description: Lab Access Requests
   (	ACCESS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID VARCHAR2(15), 
	ARRIVAL DATE, 
	DEPARTURE DATE, 
	USER_TYPE VARCHAR2(5) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(30), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(400), 
	LAB_NAME VARCHAR2(100), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), 
	GUEST_NET VARCHAR2(1), 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	VIDEO_ELETTRA VARCHAR2(1), 
	VIDEO_FERMI VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT PK_ACCESSES PRIMARY KEY (ACCESS_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_ACCESSES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_INS_ID FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.STATUS IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''AccessStatus'''
	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.USER_TYPE IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''UserTypes'''

NL Query: How many institutes have more than 20 users who do not have proposal, beamtime or a users' meeting record.
SQL Query:
Select "Affiliation", Count(*) as "No. of Users" From
(SELECT DISTINCT u.id as USERID,
ins.name as "Affiliation"
from users u 
left join proposals p on u.id=p.usr_id 
left join PARTICIPANTS pa on u.id=pa.USR_ID 
left join INSTITUTES ins on u.INS_ID=ins.ID 
left join SUP_EVENTS_PP um on u.id=um.usr_id 
left join SUP_EVENTS_PP_15th_um um15 on u.id=um15.usr_id 
left join SUP_EVENTS_PP_16um um16 on u.id=um16.usr_id 
inner join sup_personal_data_form_t pd on u.id=pd.usr_id 
where 
p.usr_id is null 
and pa.usr_id is null 
and um.id is null 
and um15.id is null 
and um16.id is null)
Group by "Affiliation"
Having Count(*) > 20;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

	CASE7B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE,

NL Query: كم عدد المؤسسات التي لديها اكثر من 20 مستخدما ليس لديهم اي سجل لمقترحات او beamtime  او اجتماعات مستخدمين؟
SQL Query:
Select "Affiliation", Count(*) as "No. of Users" From
(SELECT DISTINCT u.id as USERID,
ins.name as "Affiliation"
from users u 
left join proposals p on u.id=p.usr_id 
left join PARTICIPANTS pa on u.id=pa.USR_ID 
left join INSTITUTES ins on u.INS_ID=ins.ID 
left join SUP_EVENTS_PP um on u.id=um.usr_id 
left join SUP_EVENTS_PP_15th_um um15 on u.id=um15.usr_id 
left join SUP_EVENTS_PP_16um um16 on u.id=um16.usr_id 
inner join sup_personal_data_form_t pd on u.id=pd.usr_id 
where 
p.usr_id is null 
and pa.usr_id is null 
and um.id is null 
and um15.id is null 
and um16.id is null)
Group by "Affiliation"
Having Count(*) > 20;

CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES

	NAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE,

	ZIP VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_TYPE VARCHAR2(3),

	MODIF_DATE DATE, 
	STATE_PROV VARCHAR2(40), 
	ITALIAN_PROV VARCHAR2(2), 
	ITALIAN_CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	END_DATE DATE, 
	PEC VARCHAR2(60), 
	NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(60), 
	 CONSTRAINT INS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.NAME IS 'Label=Institute name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ADDRESS IS 'Label=Address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ZIP IS 'Label=Zip code'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

NL Query: get the main details (mentioning feasibility as well) of the new proposals which are placed for evaluation from the archaeology & heritage panel but aren't stated as cultural heritage related experiments
SQL Query:
SELECT  p.ID AS "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname "Proposer",
p.TITLE AS "Title", 
DECODE(p.FEASIBILITY,NULL,'---','Y','Viable','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting', 'R','Feasible on required beamline','A','Feasible on alternative beamline') AS "Feasibility" 
FROM PROPOSALS p, users u 
WHERE p.USR_ID=u.ID 
and p.status = 'E'
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1) 
and p.cultural_heritage = 'N'
AND instr('AHS',nvl(CMT_ID,RESEARCH_AREA))>0 
ORDER BY p.ID desc;

NL Query: What is the official name and description of all the beamlines? Also, are there any which aren't currently operating?
SQL Query:
SELECT 
beam.name as "Beamline Official Name" ,
beam.description as "Beamline Official Description",
beam.operative as "In Operation"
FROM beamlines beam;

NL Query: List the name, institute and institute country of all the user who have more than one proposal recorded, also include the number of proposals for each one.
SQL Query:
select u.id,
 u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Name",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
p.num_p as "Number of Proposals"
from users u, institutes i,
(select usr_id,
count(*) as num_p
from proposals
group by usr_id
having count(*) > 1) p
where u.ins_id = i.id

CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES

   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'

NL Query: اعطيني الاسم والمعهد ودولة المعهد لكل المستخدمين الذين لديهم اكثر من مقترح مقدم باسمهم، مع توضيح عدد المقترحات لالتي قدمها كل منهم.
SQL Query:
select u.id,
 u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Name",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
p.num_p as "Number of Proposals"
from users u, institutes i,
(select usr_id,
count(*) as num_p
from proposals
group by usr_id
having count(*) > 1) p
where u.ins_id = i.id
and u.id = p.usr_id
order by "Number of Proposals" desc;

NL Query: من هم ال users الذين قاموا بتسليم اكثر من 3 مقترحات؟ بالاضافة الى اسمائهم، استخرج اسم المؤسسة التي يعملون بها و في اي يدولة تكون و ايضا وضح كم مقترحا سلم كل من ال users
SQL Query:
select u.id,
 u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
p.num_p as "Number of Proposals"
from users u, institutes i,
(select usr_id,
count(*) as num_p
from proposals
group by usr_id
having count(*) > 3) p
where u.ins_id = i.id
and u.id = p.usr_id
order by "Number of Proposals" desc;

CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'
Schema.institutes:
CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CNT_NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	ZIP VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_TYPE VARCHAR2(3), 
	MODIF_USR_ID NUMBER, 
	MODIF_DATE DATE, 
	STATE_PROV VARCHAR2(40), 
	ITALIAN_PROV VARCHAR2(2), 
	ITALIAN_CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	END_DATE DATE, 
	PEC VARCHAR2(60), 
	NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(60), 
	 CONSTRAINT INS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.NAME IS 'Label=Institute name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ADDRESS IS 'Label=Address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ZIP IS 'Label=Zip code'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''

NL Query: For users who have submitted multiple proposals, view their name, institute, country (of the institute) and the number of proposals under their name. Start from the user with the most proposals.
SQL Query:
select u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "User",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
p.num_p as "Number of Proposals"
from users u, institutes i,
(select usr_id,
count(*) as num_p
from proposals
group by usr_id
having count(*) > 1) p
where u.ins_id = i.id
and u.id = p.usr_id
order by "Number of Proposals" desc;

NL Query: show the main information about users in DB including their nationalities as well.
SQL Query: select u.id, u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer", c.name as "Nationality" from users u join countries c on c.code = u.nationality;

Schema.countries:
CREATE TABLE COUNTRIES 
   (	NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CODE VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EU VARCHAR2(1), 
	IBAN_LEN NUMBER, 
	CONT_CODE VARCHAR2(2), 
	ACCOUNT_POSITION NUMBER, 
	ACCOUNT_LENGTH NUMBER, 
	CERIC VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT CNT_PK PRIMARY KEY (CODE, NAME)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN COUNTRIES.NAME IS 'Label=Country'

NL Query: اعرض العلامة الأدنى للقبول في كل فصل
SQL Query:
select sem as "Semester", 
threshold as "Threshold" 
from proposals_threshold
order by sem desc;

NL Query: Show the number of unscheduled proposals, so either rejected, dismissed, deleted, not allocated or simply cancelled by the proposer themselves, in each beamline and all the semesters since the start of each.
SQL Query:
select semester as "Semester",
nvl(bml_name, required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
count(id) as "Unscheuled Proposals"
from proposals
where status in ('N','I','X','n','c')
group by semester, nvl(bml_name, required_bml_name)
order by nvl(bml_name, required_bml_name), semester;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: اي من الأوراق البحثية التي تم نشرها خلال الفترة ما بين عام 2020 و 2024 هي حصيلة تعاون بين احد المستخدمين و جهة أخرى؟ أظهر رقم التعريف الخاص بالبحث بالإضافة إلى اسماء المؤلفين و عنوان البحث مفصلا (مع ذكر اسم المجلة و اصدارها و في اي صفحات يوجد البحث) و السنة و الرابط الالكتروني للبحث
SQL Query:
select pbl_id AS "Publication ID",
iuulib.concatenate('select pa.aut_in||'' ''||pa.aut_name from publi_aut pa where pa.pbl_id='||pbl_id||' order by pa.aut_id') "Authors",
TITLE ||','|| JOURNAL_NAME ||', '||VOLUME||'-'||ISSUE||', pp. '||FROM_PAGE||'-'||TO_PAGE||'.' "Description",
year "Year", 
'' || doi || '' doi
FROM PUBLI
WHERE  collaboration = 'Y'
and year between 2020 and 2024
order by year desc;

Schema.publi:
CREATE TABLE PUBLI --Description = Publication details 
   (	PBL_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(1024), 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(64) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	WORK_DONE_ELE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- work_done_ele: Y= Yes, P = 'Yes, only in part', N = No
	ELE_AUTHOR CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- ele_author: Y = Yes, N = No
	JOURNAL_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	VOLUME VARCHAR2(128), 
	ISSUE VARCHAR2(32), 
	QTR VARCHAR2(20), 
	YEAR NUMBER, 
	BEAM_1 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_2 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_3 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_4 VARCHAR2(30), 
	PROP_1 NUMBER, 
	PROP_2 NUMBER, 
	PROP_3 NUMBER, 
	PROP_4 NUMBER, 
	COMMENTS VARCHAR2(1024), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	PHONE VARCHAR2(50), 
	ELE_NUM VARCHAR2(20), 
	THES_TYPE VARCHAR2(30), 
	INSTITUTION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CITY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	COUNTRY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	PATENT_NUMB VARCHAR2(30), 
	REVIEW VARCHAR2(50), 
	PUB_TYPE VARCHAR2(50), 
	REVISION VARCHAR2(30), 
	BOOK_TITLE VARCHAR2(255), 
	PUBLISHER VARCHAR2(100), 
	EDITION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONFERENCE VARCHAR2(128), 
	PBL_TYPE CHAR(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- pbl_type: B=Book or Book Chapter, C=Conference Presentations, G=SESAME Highlights, I=Internal SESAME Staff Reports, J=Journal Article, P=Patent, R=Contributed News Articles, Book Reviews, T=Thesis
	STATUS CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- status: Y =  Validated, N = Submitted 
	EDITOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	ADVISOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	DAY NUMBER, 
	PRES_TYPE VARCHAR2(10), 
	FPAGE VARCHAR2(10), 
	UE_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	OTHER VARCHAR2(256), 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	OTHER_BEAM VARCHAR2(30), 
	OTHER_LAB VARCHAR2(50), 
	OTHER_PUBLI_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	CONF_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONF_COUNTRY VARCHAR2(40), 
	CONF_DATE DATE, 
	URL VARCHAR2(2000), 
	DOI VARCHAR2(4000), 
	REVIEW_PANEL VARCHAR2(20), 
	IN_HOUSE VARCHAR2(20), 
	COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(20), 
	ILO VARCHAR2(20), 
	REVIEW_WORK VARCHAR2(20), 
	LABORATORY VARCHAR2(40), 
	SERIAL_NUMBER VARCHAR2(200), 
	FROM_PAGE VARCHAR2(20), 
	TO_PAGE VARCHAR2(20), 
	LABORATORY_2 VARCHAR2(40), 
	LABORATORY_3 VARCHAR2(40), 
	WORK_DONE_CERIC CHAR(1), 
	CERIC_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT PUBLI_PK PRIMARY KEY (PBL_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_PUBLI_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN PUBLI IS 'List = select code, description from list_of_values where list=''PubliWorkDoneEle'''

NL Query: هل توجد اي اوراق تعاونية منشورة بين عامي 2020 و2024؟ اذا كانت موجودة، فاعرض الرقم التعريفي وقائمة المؤلفين والوصف الكامل بما يشمل العنوان واسم المجلة والمجلد والعدد والصفحات وسنة النشر ورابط DOI.
SQL Query:
select pbl_id AS "Publication ID",

TITLE ||','|| JOURNAL_NAME ||', '||VOLUME||'-'||ISSUE||', pp. '||FROM_PAGE||'-'||TO_PAGE||'.' "Description",
year "Year", 
'' || doi || '' doi
FROM PUBLI
WHERE  collaboration = 'Y'
and year between 2020 and 2024
order by year desc;

NL Query: هل هناك اوراق تعاون تم نشرها خلال الفترة من 2020 الى 2024؟ اذا نعم، اعرض المعرف واسماء المؤلفين والوصف الكامل متضمنا العنوان واسم المجلة والمجلد والعدد والصفحات وسنة النشر ورابط DOI.
SQL Query:
select pbl_id AS "Publication ID",
iuulib.concatenate('select pa.aut_in||'' ''||pa.aut_name from publi_aut pa where pa.pbl_id='||pbl_id||' order by pa.aut_id') "Authors",
TITLE ||','|| JOURNAL_NAME ||', '||VOLUME||'-'||ISSUE||', pp. '||FROM_PAGE||'-'||TO_PAGE||'.' "Description",
year "Year", 
'' || doi || '' doi
FROM PUBLI
WHERE  collaboration = 'Y'
and year between 2020 and 2024
order by year desc;

NL Query: What was the average of unused hours in each beamline through the semesters?
SQL Query:
select p.semester as "Semester",
s.bml_name as "Beamline",
trunc(avg(s.unusable_shifts),2) as "Average Unused Hours"
from summaries s 
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
group by p.semester, s.bml_name
order by p.semester, s.bml_name;

   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE,

	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No

	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: احسب متوسط عدد ساعات الحزمة غير المستخدمة لكل خط اشعاع محدد عبر جميع الفصول.
SQL Query:
select p.semester as "Semester",
s.bml_name as "Beamline",
trunc(avg(s.unusable_shifts),2) as "Average Unused Hours"
from summaries s 
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
group by p.semester, s.bml_name
order by p.semester, s.bml_name;

NL Query: List all this semester's proposals which have only one user, get their name, proposal title, at which beamline and whether or not they're feasible to carry out this round.
SQL Query:
select p.id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer", 
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
decode(p.FEASIBILITY,NULL,'---','Y','Viable','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting','R','Feasible on required beamline','A','Feasible on alternative beamline') AS "Feasibility"
from proposals p
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
left join participants par on par.prop_id = p.id
where par.prop_id is null
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
order by p.id desc;

NL Query: اعرض جميع مقترحات هذا الفصل التي تحتوي على مستخدم واحد فقط، مع الاسم، عنوان المقترح، خط الشعاع، وما إذا كانت قابلة للتنفيذ في هذه الجولة أم لا
SQL Query:
select p.id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer", 
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
decode(p.FEASIBILITY,NULL,'---','Y','Viable','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting','R','Feasible on required beamline','A','Feasible on alternative beamline') AS "Feasibility"
from proposals p
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
left join participants par on par.prop_id = p.id
where par.prop_id is null
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
order by p.id desc;

	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE,

	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1),

	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25),

	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3),

	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: Out of all the new proposals this semester, list the ones with a solo proposer. Get their name, title of their proposal, beamline and whether this proposal is new, a resubmission or a continuation of previous ones.
SQL Query:
select p.id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer", 
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
decode(p.proposal_category, 'N', 'New', 'C', 'Continuation', 'R', 'Resubmission') as "Category"
from proposals p
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
left join participants par on par.prop_id = p.id
where par.prop_id is null
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
order by p.id desc;

NL Query: من بين جميع المقترحات الجديدة في هذا الفصل، اعرض تلك التي يعمل عليها شخص واحد فقط. احصل على اسمه، عنوان المقترح، beamline name، وما إذا كان المقترح جديدا أو إعادة تقديم أو استمرارية لمقترحات سابقة
SQL Query:
select p.id, 
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer", 
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
decode(p.proposal_category, 'N', 'New', 'C', 'Continuation', 'R', 'Resubmission') as "Category"
from proposals p
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
left join participants par on par.prop_id = p.id
where par.prop_id is null
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
order by p.id desc;

	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) DISABLE
);

NL Query: Which experiments didn't require any setup time? What was the title, beamline and semester of each?
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
s.bml_name as "Beamline",
s.setup_shifts as "Setup Hours",
p.semester as "Semester"
from summaries s
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
join users u on u.id = s.usr_id
where s.setup_shifts = 0;

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: استخرج عناوين المقترحات في الفصل الحالي التي ابلغت عن استخدام مواد ذات خطر بيولوجي (bio-hazard)، مع توضيح اسم المادة والحاوية التي ستنقل فيها
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
si.substance as "Substance",
si.container as "Container",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from proposals p
join users u  on u.id = p.usr_id
join safety_infos si on si.prop_id = p.id
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
and si.bio_hazard = 'Y';

Schema.proposals:
